title: Greenhouse: ESP32 Controller Health
description: ESP32 hardware health, state machine, planning system, setpoint pipeline, data pipeline, alerts

panels.title: WiFi RSSI

targets.rawSql: SELECT wifi_rssi AS "dBm" FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows controller WiFi signal strength over time.

panels.title: Free Heap

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(heap_bytes::numeric, 0) AS "KB" FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows free memory on the ESP32 controller over time.

panels.title: Uptime

targets.rawSql: SELECT uptime_s FROM diagnostics ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows controller uptime or service uptime over time.

panels.title: Case Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT temp_case AS "°F" FROM climate WHERE temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Reboots (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Reboots" FROM v_reboot_log

panels.description: Shows reboot count over the last 30 days.

panels.title: Last Reset

targets.rawSql: SELECT reset_reason FROM diagnostics WHERE reset_reason IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the most recent reset reason or reset timestamp.

panels.title: Heap + RSSI (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), ROUND(heap_bytes::numeric, 0) AS "Heap (KB)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wifi_rssi AS "RSSI (dBm)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows controller free memory and WiFi signal strength over the last 30 days.

panels.title: Case Temp + Uptime (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), temp_case AS "Case Temp (°F)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_case IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), uptime_s / 3600.0 AS "Uptime (hrs)" FROM diagnostics WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Current State

targets.rawSql: SELECT value AS "State" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: Transitions (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours'

panels.description: Shows how many state transitions the controller made over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Unique States (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT value) AS "States" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours'

panels.description: Shows greenhouse equipment or controller state over time.

panels.title: State Timeline (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "State" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows the sequence of controller states over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Transition Rate (hourly)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(hour), transitions AS "Transitions/hr" FROM v_state_transition_rate WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) ORDER BY hour

panels.description: Shows how frequently the controller is changing state each hour.

panels.title: State Distribution (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT value AS "State", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM system_state WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY value ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.description: Shows how controller time was distributed across states over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Active Plan

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan_id FROM setpoint_plan WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows planning behavior, compliance, or planning outcomes over time.

panels.title: Plan Age

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM now() - MAX(created_at))::int / 3600 AS "Hours" FROM setpoint_plan WHERE is_active = true

panels.description: Shows planning behavior, compliance, or planning outcomes over time.

panels.title: Compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT accuracy_pct AS "Compliance" FROM v_plan_accuracy WHERE plan_id NOT LIKE 'iris-reactive%' ORDER BY plan_start DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows whether controller outcomes are matching planned intent.

panels.title: Outcome Score Trend

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(created_at), outcome_score AS "Score" FROM plan_journal WHERE outcome_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY created_at

panels.description: Shows the recent trend in controller or planning outcome quality.

panels.title: Forecast Bias (temp)

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM fn_forecast_correction('temp_f', 24)

panels.description: Shows temperature behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Last 10 Plans

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan_id, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Created", COALESCE(outcome_score::text, '-') AS "Score", COALESCE(LEFT(hypothesis, 60), '-') AS "Hypothesis" FROM plan_journal ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Shows planning behavior, compliance, or planning outcomes over time.

panels.title: Writes (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM setpoint_changes WHERE ts > now() - interval '24 hours'

panels.description: Shows how many setpoint writes were issued over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Oscillations (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(oscillations) FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE hour > now() - interval '24 hours'

panels.description: Shows how many oscillation events were detected over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Source Split

targets.rawSql: SELECT source AS "Source", COUNT(*) AS "Writes" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE ts > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY source

panels.description: Shows where controller writes came from, split by source.

panels.title: Write Rate + Oscillations (hourly)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(hour), SUM(writes) AS "Writes" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
SELECT $__time(hour), SUM(oscillations) AS "Oscillations" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.description: Shows hourly write activity alongside oscillation counts.

panels.title: Top Oscillators (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT parameter, SUM(oscillations) AS "Oscillations", SUM(writes) AS "Total Writes" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE hour > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY parameter HAVING SUM(oscillations) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Shows which parameters oscillated most over the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Oscillation Heatmap (param × hour)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(hour), parameter AS "metric", oscillations AS "value" FROM v_setpoint_velocity WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) AND oscillations > 0 ORDER BY hour

panels.description: Shows when and where oscillation events clustered by parameter and hour.

panels.title: Pipeline Health (live)

targets.rawSql: SELECT source, rows_1h AS "Rows/1h", rows_24h AS "Rows/24h", age_s AS "Age (s)", ROUND(null_pct_1h::numeric, 1) AS "NULL %" FROM v_data_pipeline_health ORDER BY source

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of this subsystem.

panels.title: Climate Row Rate (hourly)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(date_trunc('hour', ts)), COUNT(*) AS "Rows/hr" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows the rate of climate data ingestion by hour.

panels.title: Equipment Event Rate (hourly)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(date_trunc('hour', ts)), COUNT(*) AS "Events/hr" FROM equipment_state WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows the rate of equipment-state events by hour.

panels.title: Data Gaps

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(start_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Start", to_char(end_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "End", ROUND(duration_s::numeric, 0) AS "Duration (s)", reason FROM data_gaps ORDER BY start_ts DESC LIMIT 10

panels.description: Shows detected gaps in expected controller or telemetry data.

panels.title: Open Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_log WHERE disposition = 'open'

panels.description: Shows currently unresolved alerts.

panels.title: Alert Rate by Type (30d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(date_trunc('day', created_at)), alert_type AS "metric", COUNT(*) AS "value" FROM alert_log WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Shows alert frequency by type over the last 30 days.

panels.title: Reboot Log

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Time", reset_reason AS "Reason", ROUND(uptime_before::numeric, 0) AS "Uptime Before (s)" FROM v_reboot_log LIMIT 10

panels.description: Shows recent controller reboot events and their recorded reasons.

panels.title: Recent Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH:MI') AS "Time", alert_type AS "Type", severity AS "Severity", disposition AS "Status", LEFT(message, 80) AS "Message" FROM alert_log ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Shows the most recent alerts and their current status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT planned_ts AS time, CASE WHEN compliant THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Compliant" FROM v_plan_compliance WHERE planned_ts > now() - interval '14 days' AND parameter IN ('temp_high','temp_low','vpd_high','vpd_low') ORDER BY 1
SELECT planned_ts AS time, delta AS "Delta" FROM v_plan_compliance WHERE planned_ts > now() - interval '14 days' AND parameter IN ('temp_high','temp_low','vpd_high','vpd_low') ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Plan Compliance — Did Reality Match the Plan?
panels.description: Shows whether key planned setpoints were actually achieved and by how far they missed when they were not.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, CASE WHEN reset_reason='Task WDT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Task WDT" FROM diagnostics WHERE ts > now() - interval '14 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, CASE WHEN reset_reason='Guru/Panic' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Guru/Panic" FROM diagnostics WHERE ts > now() - interval '14 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Controller Reliability — Reset Reasons Over Time
panels.description: Marks watchdog and panic resets so reliability problems are visible instead of hidden in logs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, avg(outcome_score::numeric) AS "Plan Score" FROM plan_journal WHERE created_at > now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, count(*)::double precision AS "Plans Logged" FROM plan_journal WHERE created_at > now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Learning Loop — Plan Scores and Planning Volume
panels.description: Tracks whether the planner is producing plans and whether plan quality is improving or degrading over time.
